text.title: Unattended Upgrades Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does compliance require manual change-control for every patch?

branch.question: Is the host under Ansible/Puppet config management already patching?

text.example: Solo VPS, no Ansible → install security-only policy + Sunday 04:00 reboot + tg failure alert.
